evals.name: Author a full eval suite from a SKILL.md
evals.prompt: The skill at skills/demo-greeter/SKILL.md needs an evolve evaluation suite. Author Tier 1 triggers in evals/demo-greeter/triggers.json and Tier 2 behavioral evals in evals/demo-greeter/evals.json. Balance the triggers with positive and near-miss negative queries, and make the behavioral evals prefer deterministic assertions over the LLM judge.
evals.allowed_tools: Read Write Edit Glob Grep Skill WebFetch Bash(python3 *) Bash(mkdir *)
expectations: The generated triggers include near-miss negatives that are close to the greeting or messaging domain, not only unrelated prompts.

assertions.run: python3 -c "import json; t=json.load(open('evals/demo-greeter/triggers.json'))['triggers']; assert any(x['should_trigger'] for x in t) and any(not x['should_trigger'] for x in t)"
python3 -c "import json; e=json.load(open('evals/demo-greeter/evals.json'))['evals']; assert e and all('id' in c and 'prompt' in c for c in e)"

python3 -c "import json; e=json.load(open('evals/demo-greeter/evals.json'))['evals']; det={'file_exists','file_absent','regex','not_regex','command','tool_call'}; assert any(isinstance(a,dict) and a.get('type') in det for c in e for a in c.get('assertions',[]))"

evals.name: Balance a positives-only triggers file with near-miss negatives
evals.prompt: The skill at skills/demo-greeter/SKILL.md already has a triggers file at evals/demo-greeter/triggers.json, but it contains only positive cases. Balance it by adding near-miss negative queries (should_trigger false) that are close to the skill's domain but should not activate it. Keep the existing positives.
evals.allowed_tools: Read Write Edit Glob Grep Skill Bash(python3 *)

assertions.run: python3 -c "import json; t=json.load(open('evals/demo-greeter/triggers.json'))['triggers']; assert sum(1 for x in t if not x['should_trigger'])>=3"
python3 -c "import json; t=json.load(open('evals/demo-greeter/triggers.json'))['triggers']; assert sum(1 for x in t if x['should_trigger'])>=3"
